ogTitle: Balgowan vs Ballast Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Balgowan and Ballast Head.
heading: Balgowan vs Ballast Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Balgowan, South Australia and Ballast Head, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ballast Head has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Balgowan (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Balgowan or Ballast Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Balgowan has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Ballast Head scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Balgowan scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Ballast Head scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Balgowan or Ballast Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ballast Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
